data.title: Dedupe octahedron housePalette helper + replace magenta fallback with octahedron gold

data.body: housePalette(id) is copy-pasted in heroNavNodes.ts:9 and OctahedronHero.tsx:11, both falling back to magenta #ff00ff when a house id isn't found. Meanwhile the octahedron FACES already fall back to the model's signature gold #c4a265 (OctahedronHero.tsx:533). Fix: (1) keep ONE housePalette in heroNavNodes.ts (three-free), export it, import into OctahedronHero (remove the dup); (2) replace the #ff00ff fallback with #c4a265 via a single shared exported constant, and point the face fallback (line 533) at the same constant — one octahedron-gold fallback, no magenta. No protocol color exists (ProtocolPage is bg-background). #c4a265 is already in the conformance baseline (grandfathered). Pure refactor; zero visual change in normal operation (fallback only ever rendered on a broken lookup, which never happens).
